posts.author: Parth_Kotak
posts.community: Hindalco Industries - Attempting to reduce cyclicality of the business
posts.text: The exceptional items are largely related to the fire at their Oswego plant. Your inventory numbers are incorrect. Inventory has gone up substantially, but the jump is not 4x. image 848×283 94.7 KB

posts.author: ameydesai
posts.community: Hindalco Industries - Attempting to reduce cyclicality of the business
posts.text: Hindalco has been a clear outperformer from the NIFTY metal pack. While the recent earnings reported a drag on Earnings, the quarterly revenue increase has been 9% Y-o-Y. The OPM has remained steady at 13%, I wonder what are the exceptional items worth Rs. 6,963 crore. Does anyone have an idea? What worries me is a 3-fold increase in inventory from Rs. 7194 Crores to Rs. 24518Crores.
